news.headline: CDF Munir concludes 3-day Iran visit, discusses sustainable regional peace: ISPR
news.summary:
<p>Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of the Army Staff (COAS) Field Marshal Asim Munir and Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi have concluded a three-day official visit to Iran, the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR) said on Saturday.</p>

news.headline: Pakistan PM, army chief wrap up key trips in push for more US-Iran talks
news.summary: Asim Munir leaves Tehran while PM Shehbaz Sharif heads home from Turkiye with hopes of another round of US-Iran talks.

news.headline: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
news.summary: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.

news.headline: Iran reimposes shipping restrictions on Strait of Hormuz
news.summary:
Iran has closed the Strait of Hormuz again, according to Tehran’s Fars News Agency.
“Control of the Strait of Hormuz has returned to its previous state, and this strategic strait is under the strict management and control of Iran’s Armed Forces,” an Iranian spokesman was quoted as saying.

news.headline: Cameroon: Pope Leo XIV urges citizens to pursue peace
news.summary: Charlotte Walker-Said tells #f24debate that #PopeLeo is putting his trust in the people to root out their nations’ tyrants.➡️ https://www.france24.com/en/live
